task_tokens_consumed: Is a norm-preserving functional-extension KV cache pruning mechanism anticipated by 2024-2026 prior art?

hypothesized_clusters.cluster_name: KV cache eviction by attention magnitude
hypothesized_clusters.cluster_description: H2O StreamingLLM SnapKV that evict KV entries based on accumulated attention scores.
KIVI KVQuant CompAct that compress KV via low-rank decomposition or quantization.
MemoryLLM, Memorizing Transformers that extend memory via separate pool.
Methods using mutual-information or entropy bounds to identify essential KV entries.
Functional-analytic methods (Banach/Hilbert space, dual-space) applied to LLM compression - rare niche.

landscape_completeness_claim: Five clusters cover attention-eviction, SVD/quantization compression, memory pool, information-theoretic pruning, functional-analytic residual. Hahn-Banach specifically would fall under C4+C5 intersection.
